app.title: TriadLLM
app.welcome: TriadLLM is ready. Generate, validate, and consolidate answers from the terminal.
editor.help: Ctrl+S sends from the editor. Esc cancels and keeps the draft in the main composer.
editor.title: Expanded Composer
event.reasoning_unavailable: Reasoning was used, but no textual summary was returned by the provider.
permission.title: Approve tool execution?
slash.help:
Available commands:

/help - Show this help message
/status - Show current system status
/config - Show configuration snapshot
/permissions ask|yolo - Set permission mode (ask for approval or yolo)
/lang es|en - Change language
/models - List available profiles and active agents
/model set <orchestrator|processor|validator> <profile> - Set profile for specific agent
/tools - List available tools
/reasoning on|off - Toggle reasoning visibility
/toolresults on|off - Toggle tool results visibility
/new - Start fresh conversation
/clear - Clear transcript
/cancel - Cancel current turn
/quit - Exit the application
splash.help: Press any key to continue. This screen closes automatically in 5 seconds.
status.line: State: {state} | Language: {language} | Permissions: {permission} | Profile: {profile} | Reasoning: {reasoning} | Tools: {tools} | Queue: {queued}
